text:
Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood Original Soundtrack 2 is a soundtrack album containing music from Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

Tracklist

Golden Time Lover (TV size) (1:32)
Mount Briggs ~Overture~ (2:26)
Pride (1:55)
Envy Revealed (1:59)
The Plot Thickens (1:41)
Xing Symphony ~Overture~ (1:30)
Anticipation (1:25)
Nightmares (1:38)
Desolation (2:15)
The Fullmetal Alchemist ~Legato~ (2:24)
Nocturne of Amestris ~Duet~ (1:37)
Daylight in Amestris (1:25)
Nocturne of Amestris (1:51)
Tsunaida Te (TV size)  (1:30)
T.B.C. (1:19)
Entr'acte (1:25)
Period (TV size) (1:30)
No Answer (1:23)
Crisis in the North (1:35)
The Land of Ishvala (1:46)
Lapis Philosophorum ~Piano Solo~ (1:37)
Mount Briggs ~Undulation~ (1:31)
What Lies Beneath (1:02)
Versus Homonculus (1:46)
Battle Scherzo (2:06)
Far East Suite ~Pizzicato~ (1:29)
Pastorale Rondo (1:22)
Stepping Along (1:33)
Shunkan Sentimental (TV size)  (1:31)
To Be King (2:02)
Brotherhood ~Postlude~ (1:23)

[Total Disc Length: 51:28]

Notes

Music composed, scored, and arranged by Akira Senju WARSAW RECORDING SESSION (2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 9, 13, 22, 24, 25, 26) Conducted by Mario Klemens (3, 5, 7, 9, 13, 22, 24) & Akira Senju (2, 4, 25, 26) Orchestra: Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra Recording & Editing: Andrzej Sasin, Aleksandra Nagórko for CD Accord Recorded at Warsaw Philharmonic Hall & Studio (Filharmonia Narodowa), Warsaw, Poland on February 18 to 21, June 11 & 12, 2009 Manager of the Recording: Wojciech Nowak Orchestra Inspector: Tadeusz Bonicki 

TOKYO RECORDING SESSION (6, 8, 10, 11, 12, 15, 16, 18, 19, 20, 21, 23, 27, 28, 30, 31) Conducted by Akira Senju Strings: Masatsugu Shinozaki Strings Piano & Celesta: Haruki Mino Guitar, Portuguese Guitar & Mandolin: Koichiro Tashiro Flute & Alto Flute: Mitsuru Sohma Harp: Tomoyuki Asakawa Choir: Gey's Ax 

 [Opening & Ending Themes] 

M-01 - TV Anime "Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood" 3rd Opening Theme Performer: Sukima Switch Composer: Takuya Ohashi, Shintaro Tokita Arranger: Takuya Ohashi, Shintaro Tokita Lyricist: Takuya Ohashi, Shintaro Tokita 
M-14 - TV Anime "Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood" 3rd Ending Theme Performer: Lil'B Composer: Yuki Kuromitsu Arranger: Yuki Kuromitsu Lyricist: AILA 
M-17 - TV Anime "Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood" 4th Opening Theme Performer: CHEMISTRY Composer: Jonas Myrin, Peter Kvint, Kotaro Egami Arranger: Yuusuke Itagaki Lyricist: Kaname Kawabata [川畑要] 
M-29 - TV Anime "Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood" 4th Ending Theme Performer: SCANDAL Composer: Yuichi Tajika Arranger: Keita Kawaguchi Lyricist: SCANDAL, Natsumi Kobayashi
